headline: Morgan Stanley Lays Off 3% of Its Workforce
summary: Morgan Stanley is laying off around 3% of its workforce or about 2,500 people, according to people familiar with the matter. The cuts are affecting employees in the bank’s three major divisions, the people said, which are investment banking and trading, wealth management and investment management.

headline: How The Indra Sistemas (BME:IDR) Story Is Shifting As Targets Rise And Risks Rebalance
summary: Indra Sistemas is back in focus after its modeled Fair Value price target was revised to €59.29 from €55.10, while separate research moved the official share rating to Equal Weight alongside a higher €60 price target. Taken together, these updates reflect analysts reassessing where they think the shares belong over the next phase, even as they flag a more balanced risk reward profile. As you read on, you will see how these shifts fit into the broader story and what to watch as this narrative...

headline: Reframing The AstraZeneca (LSE:AZN) Story As Pipeline Progress Reshapes Earnings And Valuation Expectations

That shift lines up with recent Street research, where several firms have been raising price targets in both US$ and GBp terms following a stronger earnings outlook and pipeline execution. headline: How The Drax Group (LSE:DRX) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Neutral Ratings
summary: Drax Group’s analyst fair value estimate has been revised from £9.29 to £9.61, while a key price target has moved from £9.00 to £9.50. This points to a modest uplift in what some analysts think the shares could be worth. That adjustment sits alongside rating shifts toward more neutral calls, as recent share price strength and mixed views on execution leave sentiment more finely balanced.
